heading: Failure of employer to make comparable health savings account contributions
label: 4980G Failure of employer to make comparable health savings account contributions

children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: In the case of an employer who makes a contribution to the health savings account of any employee during a calendar year, there is hereby imposed a tax on the failure of such employer to meet the requirements of subsection (b) for such calendar year.

children.heading: Rules and requirements
children.label: b Rules and requirements
children.text: Rules and requirements similar to the rules and requirements of section 4980E shall apply for purposes of this section.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: c Regulations
children.text: The Secretary shall issue regulations to carry out the purposes of this section, including regulations providing special rules for employers who make contributions to Archer MSAs and health savings accounts during the calendar year.

children.heading: Exception
children.label: d Exception
children.text: For purposes of applying section 4980E to a contribution to a health savings account of an employee who is not a highly compensated employee (as defined in section 414(q)), highly compensated employees shall not be treated as comparable participating employees.
